subcodes.first_line: O Emigrant! Though Thou art far from the Seat of the Throne, yet art Thou near. Nearness and remoteness, in their outward aspect, are observed in a certain station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهاجر اگرچه از مقر عرش دوری ولکن قریبی قرب و بعد ظاهره در مقامی ملحوظ و در
subcodes.subjects: @nearness and remoteness, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
